title: pleroma divaricatum
intro: Pleroma divaricatum, also known as the divaricating pleroma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Traditionally, the roots and leaves of Pleroma divaricatum are prepared as a decoction or infusion, and have also been used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments to support overall health and well-being.
